# NuFIT Neutrino Oscillation Data

## Source
- **Paper:** Esteban et al. (2020), "The fate of hints: updated global analysis of three-flavor neutrino oscillations"
- **URL:** http://www.nu-fit.org/
- **Version:** NuFIT 5.2 (November 2022), Normal Ordering

## Key Values (NO, with SK atmospheric)

| Parameter | Best fit | 1sigma range |
|-----------|---------|-------------|
| sin^2(theta_12) | 0.304 | 0.292 - 0.316 |
| sin^2(theta_23) | 0.573 | 0.557 - 0.589 |
| sin^2(theta_13) | 0.02219 | 0.02157 - 0.02281 |
| dm^2_21 (eV^2) | 7.42e-5 | 7.22e-5 - 7.63e-5 |
| dm^2_31 (eV^2) | 2.515e-3 | 2.490e-3 - 2.540e-3 |
| delta_CP (deg) | 197 | 135 - 284 |
